summary: Frontend testing of 3 bug fixes and theme changes for Cornelia Trompke Consulting website. Tested homepage hero CTA buttons, Foundation section duplicate text bug, and forest green theme on About/Method/ExecutiveCoaching pages.

ui_bugs.issue: The review request refers to route '/executive-coaching' but actual route is '/work-with-me/executive-coaching'. The short URL returns 404/blank page with only footer showing. Not a regression - this is by design in the app routing.

issues: Phase gradient section shows a muted sage/medium green gradient rather than a clear ivory-to-forest-green progression. The colors appear to be a lighter sage green at top fading to medium green at bottom - not clearly ivory at one end and #0F1A12 forest green at other end. May need verification against intended design.

bug_fix_1_hero_cta_buttons.details: BEGIN THE CONVERSATION button at y=640, EXPLORE SERVICES button at y=640. Both buttons are side by side (y-diff=0). Confirmed horizontal row layout.

bug_fix_2_foundation_section_duplicate_t.details: Foundation section at ~2200px scroll shows banner image (man overlooking sea) with heading 'Leadership Is Not a Strategy. It Is a State of Being.' appearing BELOW the image. No duplicate text overlay visible on the banner image.

theme_about_hero.details: About page hero shows deep forest green/dark background (#0F1A12 range) with portrait photo.

theme_about_credentials_gradient.details: Credentials section visible with ivory/cream background transitioning. Forest green sections visible.

theme_about_final_cta.details: About page final CTA at ~2800px shows clear forest green → ivory gradient (dark green at top of CTA card transitioning to ivory/cream at bottom) with 'Begin a Conversation' heading.

theme_method_dark_sections.details: Method page hero shows near-black/forest green dark background (#0F1A12 range).

theme_executive_coaching_hero.details: EC page at /work-with-me/executive-coaching shows deep forest green hero background.

theme_executive_coaching_phase_gradient.details: Phase section shows a gradient but colors appear as muted sage/medium green rather than clear ivory-to-forest-green. May need design verification.

theme_executive_coaching_final_cta.details: Could not clearly isolate EC final CTA in screenshots taken. Test the specific scroll position near page bottom on /work-with-me/executive-coaching.

action_items: Verify PHASE_GRADIENT section on /work-with-me/executive-coaching matches intended ivory-to-forest-green progression
Note: /executive-coaching route shows blank page - if navigation links use short URLs, those need updating too
critical_code_review_comments: Navigation menu 'Work With Me' dropdown should ensure links use /work-with-me/executive-coaching (full path), not /executive-coaching
context_for_next_testing_agent: Route for Executive Coaching is /work-with-me/executive-coaching NOT /executive-coaching. All 3 bug fixes confirmed working. Forest green theme applied across About, Method, and EC pages. About final CTA gradient confirmed working (forest green → ivory). Key area to recheck: PHASE_GRADIENT on EC page and EC final CTA section.
